titleStmt.title: SII 40.93: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 93. (A.R. No. B. 71 of 1930.) Goṭṭipalle, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab lying near the ruined Mātangēśvara temple in the village.
This is dated Śaka 1061, Siddhārthi, Āśvija, śu. 1, corresponding to 1139 A.D., September 26, Tuesday.
Gives the euology of the king. Records the gift of land at Gottiprōḷa and money to the temple of Mṛidangēśvara by the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīśalaikṛta sannidhissuravarō dēvāmra
taṁgēśvaraḥ pāyādgōṁkamahīpatiṁdira
taraṁ mātappratānūjataṁ Āyura
bhīṣṭa sukhapradaṁtri parvataṁ rāgāvataṁ
samadātpāsvāṁśamahinabhūṣaṇa
mṛtaṁ sōṁmasatāśaṁkaraṁ . 1 .
bhūma pridhusatvayuktā bhūprabhu
bamuratnayōnikṣirāṁbu rāśedpra
timāsti haricatuttha vaṁśō vimeta
diśāla . 2 . tasminnabhūdgoṁka narēṁdra caṁ
dra ssaṁvarddhanvānvaya yajñamucyāhā
tmadayēvairi manōṁbujāni saṁkōca
yahmādita sarvvalōka . 3 . gāṁgēya
rāyastanayōsya jagñē cōḍakṣiti
śō vibudhārttihārī Ānaṁta bhō
gāspada cārugotraḥ haredāparppi
ta bhūrigotraḥ . 4 . tasyā
tmajōbhānunibhaprabhāvā
goṁkkakṣitiśōjani bhūritē
jāḥ yasyōdayē vairitamassubhu
hārināśamāyātya caraṇagu
yā . 5 . sarvvālaṁpyasudarśanaḥ kṣiti
suratrāṇaika niṣṭassadātvaṁ nabda pra
sarōja śōbhitakaraḥ satyāsuraḥ
kṣitā śrī dāmātula vikramaḥ
pridu yaśosatvaḥ bhrayeśśāśvatoyō
bhūyōtra virājatē haririvakṣa
ttāraniṣpaściraṁ . 6 . śrī svasti śrīmada
sōkulōttuṁga goṁka bhūpāla va
ryyaśśākābdō caṁdrārtṛḥ neṁdu
gaṇitē siddhāṁrtisṛdcarē Āśvija śu
ddha pratipadika . tādaśa śata ni

ttrayātarvvatta goṭṭi cōḷa grā
ma paścimadigā prasūta nadi mā
śrīka kṣētraṁ sarvvaṁ śrīmarnmamṛdaṁga
muni pratiṣṭiśāya mṛdaṁgēśvara dēva
ya tatudēvasrānōtpanna vasunā
sarvvaṁ datpāsāsana rūpēṇa śilāstaṁ
bhaṁ pratiṣṭāpitarvāna . 7 . ślōkaṁ mōpame
ra survvasyabhūrmadṛpramaṁguḷahara na
rakamāpnōti yāvadācaṁta saṁddaṇaṁ
dēvaḥ brahmasyaghapduni balāni su
bahalāsyaja yuddakālē vileryya
tēsya katāsēvāyadā . śatriṇā vi
kṛtō dharmma pālanīyaḥ prayatnataḥ
śatṛrēvahi śatṛśyādharmmaśśatru sa
ka sṛrja . svasti śrī manmahāmaṁḍalēśvara
kulottuṁga cōḍagoṁkaya goṭṭipro
ḷa paḍumaṭinipasāṟinantanēla
yu mridaṁgēśvara dēvaraku nā
caṁdrārkkamugā nicci sāsanamu
gā kaṁbhamu veṭṭiṁcci dēvara śrīpādāla
beṭṭinaṭṭi sommu dēvara dēviya ko
māṁḍlu bhaṭṭu konaṁ janadu dīninē
vvarēni jōṟicina vāru paṁcamahāpā
takamu sēsinavāru .
Digital edition of SII 40.93 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
